OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Loads the information provided by the employee for verification when an employer responds to a workers' compensation claim.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: LoadEmployeeResponsesForVerification

omniProcessElements.name: FetchEmployeeAssessment
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "ContextId" : "=%ContextId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSSocInsFetchEmployeeAssessment", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }
